biological_replicate: longitudinal specimens were collected during post-operative clinic visits for 18 patients.
experimental_design: results from a phase I clinical trial in which the BBB was transiently opened in glioblastoma (GBM) patients.
number_of_fractions: offline fractionation of the combined sample (~ 200 μg) into 8 fractions.
number_of_biological_replicates: longitudinal specimens were collected during post-operative clinic visits for 18 patients.
number_of_samples: 18 patients described, and 8 fractions were processed.
